import.already_exists: Collection "{name}" already exists with {count} chunks. Use --force to reimport.
import.dimension_mismatch: Collection "{name}" has {existing}-dim embeddings but current embedder uses {required}-dim. Clear and re-import: sidjua memory clear {name} && sidjua memory import <zip>

status.not_found:
Memory collection '{name}' not found.
Run: sidjua memory import <file>

embedder.cloudflare_active: Using Cloudflare Workers AI (@cf/baai/bge-base-en-v1.5, free, 768 dims). For better quality, set OPENAI_API_KEY.
embedder.fallback_bm25: No embedding provider available. Using keyword search (BM25) only. Set OPENAI_API_KEY or SIDJUA_CF_ACCOUNT_ID+SIDJUA_CF_TOKEN for semantic search.
embedder.collection_not_found: Memory collection '{name}' not found. Run: sidjua memory import <file>

memory_re_embed.split: Chunk {id} too large ({tokens} tokens, max {max}). Splitting into {parts} parts.
memory_re_embed.complete: Re-embed complete: {total} chunks ({split_count} split into {new_parts} new parts). Embedder: {provider} ({dimensions} dims).
memory_re_embed.no_embedder: No embedding provider available. Set OPENAI_API_KEY or configure Cloudflare Workers AI (SIDJUA_CF_ACCOUNT_ID + SIDJUA_CF_TOKEN).

memory_clear.confirm: Clearing all chunks and vectors for collection "{name}"...
memory_clear.complete: Collection "{name}" cleared: {chunks} chunks and {vectors} vectors deleted.

startup.embedder_hint_openai: Embedder: OpenAI {model} ({dimensions} dims) — semantic search active.
startup.embedder_hint_cloudflare: Embedder: Cloudflare Workers AI (free, 768 dims) — semantic search active.
startup.embedder_hint_none: Embedder: BM25 keyword search only. For semantic search: export OPENAI_API_KEY=sk-... or configure Cloudflare (SIDJUA_CF_ACCOUNT_ID + SIDJUA_CF_TOKEN).

init.memory_description: SIDJUA can remember agent conversations and search them later.
init.memory_bm25: BM25 only (keyword search, no semantic search)
init.memory_activate_later: Can activate later with: sidjua memory activate
init.provider_description: SIDJUA needs an AI provider to power your agents.
init.provider_guide_note: The built-in Guide agent works without any key.
init.provider_groq: Groq — free, fast, no credit card
init.provider_google: Google AI Studio — free, smart, no credit card
init.provider_other: Other — enter provider and key manually
init.provider_skip: Skip for now — only Guide agent available
init.provider_add_later: Can add later with: sidjua config provider
init.summary_guide: Guide agent ready — try: sidjua chat guide

errors.embedding_failed: Embedding failed: {error}. Falling back to keyword search.
